name: Amarc Resources Ltd.
description: Amarc Resources Ltd. is a British Columbia-focused junior mineral exploration company advancing a portfolio of large-scale copper-gold-silver projects in partnership with major mining companies. Its flagship JOY District in north-central BC hosts the high-grade AuRORA copper-gold-silver discovery, which is being advanced in a partnership with Freeport-McMoRan and was a pivotal 2025 milestone that earned the company a place on the 2026 TSX Venture 50. The company also holds the IKE and DUKE porphyry copper-gold projects in south-central and central British Columbia respectively.
